activate_when: user asks to generate branded HTML
user asks for a landing page or responsive web page
user asks for styled HTML report
user asks for HTML using brand tokens or CSS variables
do_not_activate_when: user asks for DOCX, XLSX, PDF, slides, or images without HTML
user asks only to extract brand tokens to JSON
user asks for brand strategy without an HTML artifact
minimum_inputs: brand config path, inline tokens, or permission to use fallback tokens
missing_input_behavior: use fallback tokens only when the user asked for HTML and no brand config is supplied
